bundle.shortDescription: stavR Governor — supervises the stavR daemon
bundle.longDescription: Tray companion for the stavR personal MCP gateway. Observes daemon health via /healthz and OS-service status, surfaces approval-required events as native OS notifications, and exposes operator-triggered Restart / Upgrade actions. The OS-native StavrDaemon service (WinSW / systemd / launchd) is the sole supervisor — the Governor never restarts the daemon on its own.
